title: BackpackPro
body:
# 🎒 BackpackPro
The high-performance, rank-based storage solution with smart auto-sorting!

BackpackPro gives your players a secure, portable vault that grows with them.  
With an intelligent sorting engine and deep customization, it’s the only storage plugin your server needs for a professional experience.

---

## 💎 Features
* **Dynamic Sizing** – Grant 1 to 6 rows of storage based on player ranks/permissions.
* **Smart-Sort Engine** – Right-click any empty slot to auto-stack and sort items alphabetically.
* **Global Sorting** – VIP players can sort regular chests and barrels (toggleable).
* **Base64 Security** – Safe data serialization with full NBT & enchantment support.
* **Anti-Exploit** – Prevent shulker nesting and block specific items via config.

---
**Monetize your backpacks!** Check out the [**Multi-Economy GUI & Perk System**] — a premium DeluxeMenus config that adds a full GUI shop with size upgrades, sorting perks and support for Vault, CoinsEngine & PlayerPoints.

💎 [**Get it on BuiltByBit**](https://builtbybit.com/resources/multi-economy-gui-perk-system.96441/)
🛒 [**Get it on Ko-fi**](https://ko-fi.com/s/628de88f0f)

---

## 🛠 Commands
* `/backpack` – Open your personal storage vault.
* `/bp` – Quick alias for the backpack command.

---

## 🔑 Permissions
* `backpackpro.use` – Access the backpack.
* `backpackpro.size.<1-6>` – Define backpack size.
* `backpackpro.sort.own` – Sort your own backpack.
* `backpackpro.sort.global` – Sort chests & barrels (requires config toggle).

---

## ⚙️ Configuration
Fully configurable via `config.yml`:
* Custom backpack title
* Item blacklist (e.g. shulkers)
* Global chest sorting toggle
* Full message & prefix localization

---
